name: prd-spec-generator
description: Stateless reducer that turns a feature description into a 9-file PRD. Multi-judge verification with weighted-average + Bayesian consensus, calibrated against externally-grounded oracles (schema/math/code/spec). Phase 4 closed loop: per-judge Bayesian reliability calibration, Kaplan-Meier retry budgets, Clopper-Pearson KPI gates, mechanically-sealed held-out partitions, paired-bootstrap cross-arm comparisons. Deterministic Hard Output Rules validation. 17 MCP tools, 583 tests.
